original_statement: what was the first winning team on the list?
mutated_statement: what was the first successful group on the content?
mutation_analysis: Lexical substitution + Semantic generalization: adjective "winning" replaced by near-synonym "successful" (winning → successful) | noun "team" replaced by a more general noun "group" (team → group) | noun phrase "the list" replaced by broader/ambiguous "the content" (the list → the content)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中内容识别关键信息：judge_thought写道“因此，第一次成功的团体是Elche”，并未提及任何不确定性或要求澄清。Agent的具体表现为直接根据表格比分推断出一个具体实体（Elche），没有在judge_thought或critique中使用“模糊”“不明确”“需要更多信息”等词，也未向用户提问或表示无法确定。由于Agent把变异问题中的广义词（successful/group/content）当作与原问题等价并直接给出答案，体现出没有意识到目标语义范围扩大的模糊性，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
